data.name: BGI UI Language
BGI界面语言
CommonSettingsPage
Game Language
OCR 相关配置，面向进阶用户。
data.value: Advanced OCR options for experienced users.

data.name: OCR 配置
PaddleOCR模型
aaaaaaa
cookie
cookie与调度器日志处同步
data.value: Synchronize the cookie with scheduler logs.

data.name: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
【>600】大于这个距离会缩小地图以加快传送
data.value: 【>600】Zoom the map out when distances exceed this to speed up teleports.

data.name: 【1.0-30.0】传送到七天神像之后需要等待多久恢复血量
data.value: 【1.0-30.0】How long to wait after teleporting to a Statue of The Seven before healing.

data.name: 【100-2000】 过大可能会导致鼠标移动出窗口
data.value: 【100-2000】Values that are too large may move the cursor outside the window.

data.name: 【2-100】数字越小移动鼠标的速度越快，如果移动地图时产生卡顿，请提高这个数值
data.value: 【2-100】Smaller numbers move the cursor faster; increase it if map movement stutters.

data.name: 【200-600】小于这个距离会放大地图以提高移动的精度
data.value: 【200-600】Distances below this zoom the map in for better precision.

data.name: 【测试版】非常不稳定，请谨慎选择更新！
七天神像区域
七天神像国家
七天神像设置
传送到七天神像之后是否需要移动后回血
data.value: Move after teleporting to the statue before restoring HP.

data.name: 使按键绑定设置对外部脚本生效
data.value: Make key binding settings available to external scripts.

data.name: 使用米游社数据（大概两三小时延时），对锄地数量进行修正，由于米游社cookie在一段时间后会失效，需要重新获取，所以如果当天存在米游社的数据，则上限需按照下面配置的来，否则按照上方配置的限制来（考虑到锄地之外的杀怪，如狗粮卡时间，所以估算值可能不一样）。
data.value: Use HoYoLAB data (about a 2–3 hour delay) to adjust farming counts. Because the HoYoLAB cookie expires after a period of time, it must be refreshed. If data is available for the day, use the limits configured below; otherwise use the limits above (real combat may differ because of external kills).

data.name: 修改设置后重启生效，可能存在使游戏崩溃的BUG
data.value: Takes effect after restarting; may cause game crashes.

data.name: 关于 BetterGI
其他设置
单次鼠标移动的最大距离
启用UID遮盖
启用保存截图功能（开发者）
启用全局按键映射
启用后将自动向七天神像方向移动
data.value: Automatically move toward the statue once enabled

data.name: 启用后将自动选择最近的七天神像，忽略下方指定位置
data.value: Automatically pick the nearest statue when enabled, ignoring the manual selection below.

data.name: 启用后点击右上角退出按钮会最小化到系统托盘继续运行，右键托盘图标退出
data.value: When enabled, clicking the close button minimizes to the system tray; right-click the tray icon to exit.

data.name: 启用遮罩窗口
回血等待间隔（秒）
围绕游戏窗口紫色的边框线
data.value: Purple border surrounding the game window

data.name: 在小地图周围显示东南西北的文字
data.value: Show cardinal directions around the minimap

data.name: 在遮罩内显示实时任务启用状态
data.value: Display real-time task status inside the mask

data.name: 地图放大的距离
地图移动过程中是否缩放地图
data.value: Zoom the map while moving across it

data.name: 地图缩小的距离
地图追踪优先使用的特征匹配方式
data.value: Preferred feature-matching method for map tracking

data.name: 大地图地图传送设置
如果你有游戏内改键需求，请在此配置对应的改键
data.value: Configure in-game key remaps here when needed

data.name: 如果需要使用其他模型，请在此处选择。
data.value: Choose a different model here if required.

data.name: 实时显示各种图像识别的结果
data.value: Display image recognition results in real time

data.name: 导入
帮助
建议开启，关闭该设置可能在运行部分脚本时发生错误
data.value: Recommended to enable; disabling may cause some scripts to fail.

data.name: 开启后，当每日（4点开始）统计锄地超过上限（需脚本支持，勾选允许锄地统计标志，或通过追踪文件目录的控制文件，来记录各追踪文件数据），会跳过接下来的锄地任务。
data.value: When enabled, if daily farming totals (reset at 4:00) exceed the limit—requires scripts that support farming stats or control files in the tracking folder—subsequent farming tasks are skipped.

data.name: 开启后，当调度器日志更改，或此处更改，都会同步其cookie。
data.value: When enabled, update the cookie whenever the scheduler logs or this field change.

data.name: 异常次数
当调度器任务异常抛出未预期错误时，累计一定次数后，自动重启bgi，以恢复功能。
data.value: When scheduler tasks throw unexpected errors a set number of times, automatically restart BGI to recover.

data.name: 当运行调度器任务时，异常导致任务失败的计数，当达到计数时会重启bgi。
data.value: Count how many scheduler tasks fail due to exceptions; restart BGI when the count is reached.

data.name: 当锄地小怪数量到达上限时，会跳过主目标为小怪的锄地脚本。
data.value: Skip farming scripts targeting normal mobs once the normal mob limit is reached.

data.name: 当锄地精英数量到达上限时，跳过主目标为精英的锄地脚本。
data.value: Skip farming scripts targeting elite mobs once the elite limit is reached.

data.name: 影响所有地图追踪功能，重启后生效
data.value: Affects all map tracking features; takes effect after restart.

data.name: 战斗失败算异常
data.value: Treat combat failure as an exception

data.name: 截图功能主要用于错误排查，训练素材快速获取等开发相关功能
data.value: Screenshot capture is mainly for debugging, collecting training data, and other developer workflows.

data.name: 截图快捷键
截图遮盖UID
手动导入本地脚本仓库（zip格式）
data.value: Manually import a local script repository (ZIP)

data.name: 按键绑定设置
日小怪上限
日精英上限
是否同时重启游戏
是否就近七天神像恢复血量
显示图像识别结果
显示实时任务启用状态
显示小地图方位
显示日志窗口
显示游戏FPS（实验功能）
显示遮罩边框
查看
查看地图
查看地图（开发者）
查看当前识别到的位置
查看项目、文档等信息
data.value: View project information, documentation, and more

data.name: 检查是否存在最新测试版
data.value: Check for the latest beta build

data.name: 检查更新
检查软件是否有新版本可用
data.value: Check whether a new version of the software is available

data.name: 游戏失去焦点时候，强制恢复激活游戏窗口
data.value: Force the game window back to the foreground when it loses focus

data.name: 游戏语言
版本更新
生成的截图会遮盖右下角的UID区域
data.value: Captured screenshots will mask the UID area in the lower-right corner.

data.name: 用于地图追踪、自动秘境、一条龙等功能中传送功能的配置
data.value: Configuration for teleport features used by map tracking, auto domains, one-click flow, and similar tasks

data.name: 用于指定回血的七天神像
data.value: Choose which statue to use for healing

data.name: 用于配置米游社相关的信息如cookie
data.value: Configure HoYoLAB-related information such as the cookie

data.name: 直接从 Github 获取最新测试版
data.value: Fetch the latest beta directly from GitHub

data.name: 米游社cookie
米游社相关
绑定快捷键
结合米游社数据计算
脚本仓库无法在线更新时使用
data.value: 脚本仓库无法在线更新时使用

data.name: 设定一些其他功能的配置，失去焦点自动恢复等
data.value: Configure other features such as restoring focus after losing it

data.name: 访问 Github
调度器异常重启配置
调度器路径追踪任务中，打开大地图准备传送时，会首先检测是否存在需要领取的派遣任务，如果存在，则自动领取委托（调用一条龙领取奖励逻辑），选择领取城市后生效。
data.value: During scheduler path tracking, when opening the world map to teleport, first check for expeditions that can be claimed; if any exist, automatically claim them (using the one-click reward logic). Takes effect after selecting the city to claim.

data.name: 调度器路径追踪任务大地图传送过程中自动领取委托
data.value: Auto-claim expeditions while the scheduler path tracking task teleports via the world map

data.name: 路径未完全走完算异常
data.value: Treat an incomplete route as an exception

data.name: 软件设置
退出时最小化到系统托盘
data.value: Minimize to the system tray when exiting

data.name: 适用于调度器任务和部分独立任务，失去焦点后，将自动激活游戏窗口，开启此项后，如果想切出游戏窗口，可以先暂停任务，之后再切出
data.value: For scheduler and some standalone tasks, automatically reactivate the game window when it loses focus. If you need to alt-tab, pause the task first before switching out.

data.name: 选择七天神像所在区域
选择七天神像所在国家
通用功能设置
遮盖右下角的UID区域
遮罩以原神子窗体方式启动（实验功能）
data.value: Launch the mask as a Genshin child window (experimental)

data.name: 遮罩能够完全跟随窗体移动，但存在一些BUG，此配置重启后生效
data.value: Allows the mask to fully follow the window, but has bugs; takes effect after restart.

data.name: 配置
重启后生效
锄地规划配置
鼠标移动的时间间隔（毫秒）
在遮罩内显示日志窗口，
data.value: Show the log window inside the mask,

data.name: 点击打开日志文件夹
data.value: Click to open the log folder

data.name: 可以通过快捷键保存截图，文件保存在
data.value: Save screenshots via hotkey; files are stored in

data.name: 重启bgi时，同时重启游戏，需开启首页启动配置：同时启动原神、自动进入游戏，此配置才会生效。
data.value: When restarting BGI, restart the game as well. Requires the home auto-start options “Launch Genshin Impact” and “Auto-enter game” to be enabled.

data.name: 在锄地脚本中，实际战斗成功次数大于等于预期战斗次数，才能成功，否则抛出异常。可以解决锄地时，应打开地图失败、切换队伍、或卡在按Z的切换界面、卡月卡等，可能导致的无限卡死。但需要确定自己的队伍练度，有无可能连续超过配置失败次数个脚本都复活超次，导致判断失败，从而触发无限重启。
data.value: For farming scripts, count the run as successful only if actual combat wins meet or exceed expectations; otherwise throw an exception. This helps recover from getting stuck when map opening, team switching, Z prompts, or resin prompts fail. Ensure your team is strong enough to avoid repeated failures that might trigger continuous restarts.

data.name: 比战斗失败更严格的条件，勾选此项下，追踪文件，如果未执行完，算失败。此项勾选需要自身的追踪任务稳定性高。可以先关观察日志，打开异常情况统计下，有无连续标红超过失败次数的情况，有则不建议勾选。
data.value: A stricter condition than combat failure: if the tracking route does not finish, count it as a failure. Only enable if your tracking tasks are stable—check the logs for consecutive red failures beyond the configured limit before turning this on.

data.name: 脚本仓库无法在线新时使用
data.value: Use when the script repository cannot be updated online
